basic_details.job_title: KSPACE Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Kerala Spacepark (KSPACE) Deputy Manager (IT) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website kspace.kerala.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 41 years of age who have B.Tech. (IT/Computer Science) or MCA from a recognized University with 1st class degree and minimum 5 years’ IT experience are eligible to apply for these Deputy Manager (IT) vacancies. The online application process for KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026 has started on 13 May 2026 and will remain open unti

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. (IT/Computer Science)/MCA from recognized University with 1st class degree. Proficiency in reading and writing English and Malayalam languages is mandatory. Minimum 5 years' experience in the IT domain or field in reputed companies.
qualification.details: B.Tech. (IT/Computer Science)/MCA from a recognized University with a 1st class degree. Proficiency in reading and writing English and Malayalam languages is mandatory. Minimum 5 years' experience in the IT domain or field in reputed companies (as on 01.05.2026).

selection_process: Written Examination Computer Proficiency Test Group Discussion Proficiency Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KSPACE to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) recruitment is 27th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Manager (IT) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a B.Tech. (IT/Computer Science) or MCA degree from a recognized university with a 1st class degree. Proficiency in English and Malayalam is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Manager (IT) post is 41 years as of 01st May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Manager (IT) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 42,500/- to Rs. 87,000/- per month, as per the Kerala State pay revision.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Manager (IT) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Deputy Manager (IT) post in Kerala Spacepark (KSPACE).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the Deputy Manager (IT) role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of experience in the IT domain or field in reputed companies is required, as of 01st May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for the KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, Computer Proficiency Test, Group Discussion, Proficiency Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
